prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `c61be7dc`.
codex_response:
Implemented `c61be7dc` end-to-end. The rule is: keep the centered `0` cross structure, count the input `5` cells, and redraw them as a centered straight bar of the same size aligned with the pair of full separator lines; the perpendicular center separator line remains and the parallel separator pair moves adjacent to the bar. I treated the summary hints as untrusted and corrected them in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c61be7dc/notes.md): Sonnet was wrong on the length rule, and Opus was incomplete on that same invariant.

The generator matches the family by producing odd square grids with the same centered orange/black scaffold and centered gray row/column profiles that collapse to the count-preserving output bar. No new DSL primitive was needed.
